---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

**Windows version**
e.g. Windows 11 23H2 (build 22631)

**WinFast Pro X version**
e.g. 2.2.0

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Open...
2. Click...
3. See error...

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened.

**Log file**
Paste relevant lines from `%APPDATA%\WinFastProX\logs\winfast.log`

**Additional context**
Any other relevant information.
